description_long: This is a stylized wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, painted a vivid red and reinforced by two black metal hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The top surface is made of wooden planks, slightly uneven, and bordered by the upper metal hoop. On one side, a large white skull symbol with dripping paint is prominently displayed, while the opposite side features a jagged white explosion or crack-like marking. The wood grain and plank seams are clearly visible, giving the barrel a rugged, hand-crafted appearance. The object appears solid and robust, suitable for use as a prop in urban or industrial environments, and is likely hollow inside.
description: A red wooden barrel with black metal hoops, featuring a white skull and crack-like markings, and a rugged, hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white skull symbol painted on the red wooden planks, with both black metal hoops visible.
description_view_1: Side view with no markings, displaying the red wood texture and both black metal hoops.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a jagged white crack or explosion marking on the red wood, with hoops visible.
description_view_3: Side view with partial white marking visible, showing the wood grain and metal hoops.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: white skull symbol and jagged crack marking
